title: antirrhinum striatum
intro: Antirrhinum striatum, also known as the striped snapdragon, is a plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum striatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
